emails.subject: Stikeman, Elliott
emails.body: Stikeman, Elliott Carol: Peter del Vecchio is looking for Canadian counsel in connection with a paper acquisition and inquired about Stikeman. Have you worked with any of their lawyers (perhaps on the Canadian cash collateralization issue)?

emails.subject: Re: Stikeman, Elliott
emails.body: Re: Stikeman, Elliott Sara: I have not worked with Stikeman but Shari has. Carol St. Clair EB 3892 713-853-3989 (Phone) 713-646-3393 (Fax) carol.st.clair@enron.com Sara Shackleton 07/26/00 06:46 PM
